pi_items.source: Task description directly instructs to Name the report 'Active Cases by Priority'.
Task description directly instructs to set the Report Module to 'Cases'.
Task description instructs to use the 'Status' field, which maps to 'status' in the SuiteCRM Cases module database schema.
Task description explicitly instructs to filter for 'Not Equal To' 'Closed'.

Task description explicitly specifies 'Number', 'Subject', 'Priority', and 'Status'. Verified by checking SuiteCRM vardefs schema that these map exactly to 'case_number', 'name', 'priority', and 'status' respectively.
Task description explicitly instructs to add a chart titled 'Case Priority Distribution'.
Task description explicitly instructs to add a 'Pie' chart.
Task description instructs to set X-Axis to 'Priority', which maps to 'priority' in the SuiteCRM schema.

privileged_info_summary: Verified all metadata claims against the task instructions and the underlying SuiteCRM database schema. The requested report name, module, and chart properties exactly match the task description. Furthermore, by inspecting SuiteCRM's internal field mappings (vardefs), it was confirmed that the UI fields 'Number', 'Subject', 'Priority', and 'Status' for the Cases module correctly correspond to the database column names 'case_number', 'name', 'priority', and 'status' respectively.
